tweet1: She drew a flower on the wall. In permanent marker.
reply1: I stood there, staring, as she looked up at me with pride.
replies: I stood there, staring, as she looked up at me with pride.
That moment, I chose to breathe, and kneel down beside her.
Together, we made it a garden.
